Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Gratitude

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-08-10 · 5 answers
Hare Krishna,

Please accept my humble obeisances. All glories to Srila Prabhupada.

Just wanted to thank you for this nice forum. It is refreshing not to enter a forum filled with speculations, concoctions and arguments. This is an oasis in the midst of abundant cyber madness.

yhs
Hari Bhakta dasa
user [78] · 2007-08-10
Haribol admin,

PAMHO. AGTSP!!

I also wanted to thank everyone who made this site and everyone who made it nicer with their questions and comments. Its nice to associate with much more learned and wise Vaishnavas and Vaishnavis. Thanks a lot!

your worthless servant,
Servant Krsna
user [12] · 2007-08-10
I agree that this site is very nice. I think it is great we have an opportunity to discuss about things related to Krishna Consciousness.
user [1] · 2007-08-10
At pariprashnena.com, we trust the collective judgement of devotees, and that our individual contributions can make a difference in everybody elses life.

Being open to views and realizations is beneficial, as a way to construe practical down to earth knowledge.

Our policy of brahminical openness and zero tolerance to personal attacks or excluding posts, gives in return so very little need of administrative meddling, resulting in a self-managed rich featured vaishnava forum.

We are delighted to serve you all!

sadhu sanga, ki jaya!
Srila Prabhupada ki jaya!
user [19] · 2007-08-11
wow admin you write like shakespeare. :)
user [1] · 2007-08-11
OK, abridged version of the above post for busy Prabhus:

We trust devotees can get solid practical knowledge from each other.

Admin policy is to disrupt the forum as little as possible.

We are having such a good time serving you, Thank you!
